description: A forklift in the warehouse is due for its scheduled preventive maintenance.

nodes.task_description: Receive an automated alert that a piece of equipment is due for maintenance.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the alert for the specific forklift.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for the maintenance.

expected_outcome.expected: A work order is created in the maintenance system.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the maintenance with the on-site technician or an external vendor.
